name: Soldo
description: Spend management & corporate cards with Expense API for automations.

seo.title: Soldo — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Soldo: Spend management & corporate cards with Expense API for automations.

when_to_use: Corporate card expense automation via Expense API
Spend policy enforcement for team purchasing control
Receipt and expense data sync to accounting software
Virtual cards API for SaaS subscription management
Multi-entity expense management for distributed teams

cons: API is secondary to product UX
review.verdict: Credible corporate-card platform for EU SMBs, but this is a fintech product miscategorized as an API tool.
review.best_for: European SMBs automating employee expense workflows
review.not_for: US companies needing Brex or Ramp alternatives
